title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
A Bonanza packed account with availability of better services. The facilities and benefits provided are drawn absolutely on your day to day requirement from the Bank.
#####  Benefits you can avail by opening an Advantage Bonanza Account
Any branch cheque deposit and account to account transfer free.
Enhanced limit on cash withdrawal and POS on your International Debit cum ATM card.
25% discount on Locker of any size with the Bank.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank Advantage Bonanza Account is a savings banking account that provides exclusive benefits and is loaded with power packed features to woo customers like you
